sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(9)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, event_time) VALUES (1, toDateTime64('2022-02-02 12:30:45.123456789', 9));
SELECT id, toStartOfMillisecond(event_time) AS rounded_time FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET event_time = toStartOfMillisecond(toDateTime64('2022-02-02 12:30:59.987654321', 9)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toStartOfMillisecond(event_time + INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS incremented_time FROM test_table;
